channel.title: Strands Agents Blog - Context Management
channel.description: Posts tagged with "Context Management" from the Strands Agents blog.

item.title: Reduced cost, better isolation, and more resilience: Strands Agents evolves next-gen capabilities
item.description: Strands Agents ships context management that cuts costs in half, Strands Shell for sandboxed agent execution, and chaos testing and red teaming in Strands Evals 1.0.
